title: Sweetener
description: A modpack with a lot of vanilla-like QoL upgrades and some mods that can provide a lot of new things without making the game too heavy and crowded with features .
body:
Modpack with a bit less then 200 mods that aims to keep vanilla like gameplay, but "sweeten" it up with some side content with the help of Create, The RPG series, Farmers delight + addons, Mine cells and others. The focus is to create an immersive but not too crazy or heavy modpack.
I also wanted to make it possible to customize the gameplay style with Origins, LevelZ and some mods.
It includes quite a lot of vanilla friendly QoL(Quality of Life) mods.

More will be added in the future probably.
